text:
Done. The revoke function now works correctly:

1. Gets user's tokens from Alchemy (their actual holdings)
2. Checks each token against 10 known protocol spenders (Uniswap, 1inch, SushiSwap, ParaSwap, Balancer, MetaMask, OpenSea, etc.)
3. Shows only active approvals (where allowance > 0)
4. No RPC rate limiting issues - uses simple `allowance` calls instead of scanning thousands of blocks

This is the standard approach used by professional approval scanners.
